title: Ambulatory intravenous insulin and islet cell transplantation to treat severe type III insulin hypersensitivity in a patient with type 1 diabetes mellitus.
author_string: Clarke, Brigette, Loudovaris, Tom, Radford, Toni, Drogemuller, Chris, Coates, Patrick Toby et al.
abstract: Allogenic pancreatic islet cell transplantation is an appropriate treatment option to consider in the management of refractory cases of severe hypersensitivity to insulin in patients with type 1 diabetes mellitus.
